records.question: Which users named Tal Galili, with accountid at most 93886 and no more than 5 downvotes, whose websiteurl is exactly http://www.r-statistics.com and last accessed on 2014-09-02 14:18:16, have votes created on or before 2010-10-08 and comments made since 2010-09-28 21:09:48?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN comments ON users.id = comments.userid
JOIN votes ON users.id = votes.userid
WHERE users.accountid <= 93886 AND users.downvotes <= 5 AND users.websiteurl = 'http://www.r-statistics.com' AND users.lastaccessdate = '2014-09-02 14:18:16.0' AND votes.creationdate <= '2010-10-08' AND users.displayname = 'Tal Galili' AND comments.creationdate >= '2010-09-28 21:09:48.0'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Id FROM users AS T1 WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Tal Galili' AND T1.AccountId <= 93886 AND T1.DownVotes <= 5 AND T1.WebsiteUrl = 'http://www.r-statistics.com' AND T1.LastAccessDate = '2014-09-02 14:18:16' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM votes AS T2 WHERE T2.UserId = T1.Id AND T2.CreationDate <= '2010-10-08') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM comments AS T3 WHERE T3.UserId = T1.Id AND T3.CreationDate >= '2010-09-28 21:09:48')

records.question: Who are the users with a website URL exactly http://www.mines-paristech.fr/Services/Annuaire/&?id=8828, created on 2010-07-20 12:52:54.0, last accessed on 2014-09-11 22:19:31.0, and whose posts have a score of exactly 3 and zero comments?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN posts ON users.id = posts.lasteditoruserid AND users.id = posts.owneruserid
WHERE posts.score = 3 AND users.lastaccessdate = '2014-09-11 22:19:31.0' AND users.websiteurl = 'http://www.mines-paristech.fr/Services/Annuaire/&?id=8828' AND users.creationdate = '2010-07-20 12:52:54.0' AND posts.commentcount = 0
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Id FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.WebsiteUrl = 'http://www.mines-paristech.fr/Services/Annuaire/&?id=8828' AND T1.CreationDate = '2010-07-20 12:52:54.0' AND T1.LastAccessDate = '2014-09-11 22:19:31.0' AND T2.Score = 3 AND T2.CommentCount = 0

records.question: Which users with an accountid exactly 449752 have related comments and have related votes with votetypeid exactly 5?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN comments ON users.id = comments.userid
JOIN votes ON users.id = votes.userid
WHERE users.accountid = 449752 AND votes.votetypeid = 5
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Id FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN comments AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN votes AS T3 ON T1.Id = T3.UserId WHERE T1.AccountId = 449752 AND T3.VoteTypeId = 5

records.question: Which users have a post history with the revisionguid exactly 33f37785-3b56-4104-a73c-27faf5b459df?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN posthistory ON users.id = posthistory.userid
WHERE posthistory.revisionguid = '33f37785-3b56-4104-a73c-27faf5b459df'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Id FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.RevisionGUID = '33f37785-3b56-4104-a73c-27faf5b459df'

records.question: Which users named krio, with an account ID of at most 56158, created their accounts on or after 2011-04-12 14:05:29, have at least 101 reputation, at least 1 view, last accessed on 2011-04-17 13:16:41, and have votes of type exactly 5 created since 2011-04-12?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN votes ON users.id = votes.userid
WHERE users.creationdate >= '2011-04-12 14:05:29.0' AND users.reputation >= 101 AND users.views >= 1 AND votes.votetypeid = 5 AND users.lastaccessdate = '2011-04-17 13:16:41.0' AND users.displayname = 'krio' AND users.accountid <= 56158 AND votes.creationdate >= '2011-04-12'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Id FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN votes AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'krio' AND T1.AccountId <= 56158 AND T1.CreationDate >= '2011-04-12 14:05:29' AND T1.Reputation >= 101 AND T1.Views >= 1 AND T1.LastAccessDate = '2011-04-17 13:16:41' AND T2.VoteTypeId = 5 AND T2.CreationDate >= '2011-04-12'

records.question: Who are the users with an accountid exactly 1680046?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
WHERE users.accountid = 1680046
records.pred_sql: SELECT Id FROM users WHERE AccountId = 1680046

records.question: Who are the users named chl with no more than 214 downvotes who have earned badges and cast votes on or after August 21, 2010?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN badges ON users.id = badges.userid
JOIN votes ON users.id = votes.userid
WHERE votes.creationdate >= '2010-08-21' AND users.downvotes <= 214 AND users.displayname = 'chl'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Id FROM users AS T1 WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'chl' AND T1.DownVotes <= 214 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM badges AS T2 WHERE T2.UserId = T1.Id) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM votes AS T3 WHERE T3.UserId = T1.Id AND T3.CreationDate >= '2010-08-21')

records.question: Which users have exactly 2 upvotes, at least 165 reputation, exactly 9 views, were created on or before 2011-11-09 01:34:35.0, and have an account ID no more than 412767?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
WHERE users.upvotes = 2 AND users.reputation >= 165 AND users.creationdate <= '2011-11-09 01:34:35.0' AND users.views = 9 AND users.accountid <= 412767
records.pred_sql: SELECT Id FROM users WHERE UpVotes = 2 AND Reputation >= 165 AND Views = 9 AND CreationDate <= '2011-11-09 01:34:35.0' AND AccountId <= 412767

records.question: Which users have an account ID of at least 2607182, reputation of at least 13, no upvotes, no more than zero downvotes, and no more than one view, with creation date on or before 2013-04-08 14:47:21 and last access on or before 2013-04-10 13:28:13?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
WHERE users.accountid >= 2607182 AND users.lastaccessdate <= '2013-04-10 13:28:13.0' AND users.downvotes <= 0 AND users.upvotes = 0 AND users.reputation >= 13 AND users.views <= 1 AND users.creationdate <= '2013-04-08 14:47:21.0'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Id FROM users WHERE AccountId >= 2607182 AND Reputation >= 13 AND UpVotes = 0 AND DownVotes <= 0 AND Views <= 1 AND CreationDate <= '2013-04-08 14:47:21' AND LastAccessDate <= '2013-04-10 13:28:13'

records.question: Who are the users with the display name exactly Pr0no that have made posts?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT users.id FROM users
JOIN posthistory ON users.id = posthistory.userid
JOIN posts ON posthistory.postid = posts.id
WHERE users.displayname = 'Pr0no'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Id FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Pr0no' GROUP BY T1.Id
